## What happened
40 cans of poisoned cat food left at mobile home park in Dryden, dog sickened WSTM Pet owners should be aware of this incident and take precautions. Affected animals: dogs, cats.
## Key facts
- **Date:** 2026-07-03
- **Affected pets:** dogs, cats
- **Severity:** high
- **Status:** confirmed
## What pet owners should do
Stay informed and monitor your pet for any symptoms mentioned above. If you suspect exposure, contact your veterinarian or a poison control center immediately.
